title: TitanGrove Wood Folding Chair - Dark Walnut with Ivory Pad - Closeout
features: When it comes to padded wedding chairs, the classic Wood Folding Chair is usually what comes to mind.

Made from solid, oak hardwood and topped off with a polyurethane finish to defend against fading from UV rays, our TitanGrove Wood Folding Chair is the ideal seating option for outdoor or indoor events, whether it be a wedding, graduation, religious service or any gathering amongst family and friends Each commercial grade folding chair weighs only 9.9 pounds and easily stacks for easy storage and transportation, making it one of the most versatile and dynamic chairs in your inventory.
Best of all, order 50 or more and get Free Shipping on any of our wooden folding chairs.
Call today for a custom quote for large volume orders.

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k, Free Shipping on 50 or more
